parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>5. Bey Herrn Daniel Eckenstein dem Buchdrucker in der Eschemer-Vorstatt sind folgende Bücher zu haben: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Dr. Johann Rambach</AUTHOR> <TITLE>erbauliches Hand-Büchlein für Kinder</TITLE> in <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT></BIBL>. <BIBL><AUTHOR>Johann Arndt</AUTHOR> <TITLE>sechs Geistreiche Bücher vom wahren Christenthum</TITLE></BIBL>; Item <BIBL><AUTHOR>deüselben</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Geistreiches Paradys-Gärtlein</TITLE> in <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT></BIBL>. <BIBL><AUTHOR>Johann-Hübner</AUTHOR> <TITLE>zweymahl zwey und fünffzig auserlesene Biblische Historien aus dem alten und neuen Testament</TITLE> in <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>Der Gnaden-Schlüssel aller Kinderen GOttes</TITLE> in <FORMAT>12mo</FORMAT></BIBL>. <BIBL><TITLE>die Weege und Wercke GOttes in der Seele</TITLE> in <FORMAT>12mo</FORMAT></BIBL>. Item: <BIBL><TITLE>Ubungen sich stets in der Gegenwart GOttes zu halten</TITLE> in <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT></BIBL></ITEM>
parsed.explanation: I fixed malformed/garbled character encodings (e.g., Bücher, Büchlein, für, Gärtlein, Hübner, Schlüssel, fünffzig), normalized faulty format values from '8v√≤' to '8vo', and repaired one structural tagging issue where the Johann Arndt entry lacked a proper closing before '; Item'. I also made punctuation/tag consistency fixes by changing ', <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>' to 'in <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>' in the final BIBL, and adding the missing 'in' before the FORMAT in the Johann-Hübner entry for consistency with the surrounding bibliographic pattern. All BIBL tags are now properly nested and closed.
